Free shipping worldwide 90-day guarantee Secure payment

Product Details

Contraindications

Please avoid this tea if you are:

  • Pregnant or breastfeeding — some herbs may affect hormone levels or uterine tone
  • Under 18 years old
  • Taking medication for diabetes, blood pressure, or thyroid conditions — consult your doctor first
  • Allergic to any of the listed botanicals
  • Suffering from a chronic illness — always seek medical advice before use

When in doubt, consult a healthcare professional before starting.

Taste & Aroma

Stop Sugar Tea offers a refreshing, naturally tart and cooling flavor with a clean, crisp finish. The peppermint delivers an instant freshness, balanced by the fruity tartness of hibiscus and the subtle earthiness of gymnema.

Flavor Profile:

  • Top notes: Fresh, cooling peppermint
  • Mid notes: Tart, fruity hibiscus with a deep ruby color
  • Base notes: Subtle earthy gymnema with a slightly bitter finish

What's inside (60g):

  • Gymnema Sylvestre
  • Hibiscus
  • Peppermint

The aroma is vibrant and invigorating — the moment you open the pouch, the peppermint and hibiscus hit you with a fresh, floral scent that makes the ritual enjoyable before the first sip.

Best enjoyed hot after meals, or iced as a refreshing afternoon drink ☀️

Sourcing & Production

Quality you can trust, crafted with centuries-old wisdom 🌿

We partnered with a small, family-owned farm in the Sichuan region of China - an area renowned for its rich soil and ideal climate for growing medicinal herbs. Unlike mass producers, they own their land and have been cultivating herbs using traditional methods passed down through generations.

Why we chose them:

After testing over a dozen suppliers for more than a year, this partnership stood out. Their commitment to quality isn't just about business - it's personal. They source the finest organic herbs from across the country, selecting only plants at peak potency.

What makes it special:

Our producer uses ancient preservation techniques that protect the delicate flavors and active compounds of each plant. No shortcuts, no harsh processing - just time-honored methods that ensure you get the full benefits nature intended.

Every batch is small-batch production, carefully crafted to maintain the highest standards. From soil to cup, every step is intentional.

Our promise:

We spent a year finding the right partner because your health deserves nothing less. This isn't just tea - it's a carefully curated blend made by artisans who understand the power of plants.

Ethically sourced. Traditionally crafted. Made for you. ✨

International Shipping

We're excited to deliver your sugar detox journey internationally! Our tea ships to multiple countries - you'll see the full list of available destinations at checkout.

Shipping Details:

  • UK: FREE shipping ✨
  • International: Shipping fees calculated at checkout
  • Delivery time: 4-12 business days depending on your location

Important to note:

All orders pass through customs as part of the international shipping process. The good news? You won't be charged any additional customs fees - we've got that covered.

Questions?

Track your order using the tracking number provided in your shipping confirmation email. For any shipping concerns, reach out to our support team - we're here to help! 💙

📖 How to Use:

Take 2 capsules daily

Preferably in the morning with a glass of water

Take with meals for better absorption

Recommended 3-month course for optimal results

settings.title: Gymnema Sylvestre
settings.subtitle: KEY FONCTION
settings.text: Glucose & Sugar Craving Support
settings.sidebar_first_text: A woody climbing shrub native to India and Africa, famously known as the "sugar destroyer" in Ayurvedic medicine. Our Gymnema is sourced exclusively from the leaves—where the potent gymnemic acids are concentrated—ensuring maximum efficacy without the woody fillers found in lower-quality blends.
settings.sidebar_second_text: Clinical studies suggest that Gymnema contains gymnemic acids that temporarily block sugar receptors on the tongue, reducing the appeal of sweet foods. It also helps improve insulin response and maintain healthy blood sugar levels.

settings.title: Hibiscus
settings.subtitle: KEY FONCTION
settings.text: Antioxidant & Metabolic Health
settings.sidebar_first_text: A vibrant, tropical flower celebrated for its deep red infusion and refreshing, tart flavor profile.
settings.sidebar_second_text: Rich in anthocyanins and polyphenols, hibiscus tea is scientifically linked to improved lipid profiles and blood pressure regulation. Its high antioxidant content helps combat oxidative stress and supports overall metabolic wellness.

settings.title: Peppermint
settings.subtitle: KEY FONCTION
settings.text: Digestive & Cooling Relief
settings.sidebar_first_text: A fragrant hybrid mint known for its high menthol content and invigorating, crisp aroma.
settings.sidebar_second_text: Peppermint is widely recognized for its antispasmodic properties, which help relax the muscles of the digestive tract to alleviate bloating. Beyond digestion, it provides a cooling effect that can help soothe inflammation and mental fatigue.

settings.liquid:
Weekly Progress: What to Expect

2 WEEKS

Cravings Getting Quieter

The urge for something sweet after meals starts to feel less urgent and easier to ignore.

Steadier Energy

The mid-afternoon energy crash begins to smooth out as blood sugar spikes reduce.

1 MONTH

Sugar Cravings Under Control

You stop reaching for sweets automatically. It feels like a choice now, not a compulsion.

Less Bloating

Digestion feels calmer, especially after meals that would normally leave you feeling heavy.

2 MONTHS

Clearer Skin

Less jawline and chin breakouts as sugar-driven inflammation starts to decrease.

Appetite Regulated

You naturally eat less without restricting — hunger feels balanced throughout the day.

3 MONTHS

New Habits Anchored

Sugar no longer controls your routine. Your taste buds have reset and overly sweet things taste different.

Your New Normal

More energy, calmer skin, stable mood. This is what life with balanced blood sugar feels like.

settings.text: Scoop 1 teaspoon (about 2g)
Pour 200ml hot water (85-90°C)
Cover & steep 5-7 min
Sip slowly and enjoy 1–2 cups daily

settings.text: Reduce sugar & snack cravings
Support blood sugar balance
Calm stress-related eating
Boost digestion & reduce bloating

settings.title: Who can consume this tea?
settings.text: This tea is designed for adults who experience sugar cravings, emotional eating, or energy dips throughout the day. It is suitable for both men and women looking for a natural, clean solution.

settings.title: What’s the best time to drink the brew?
settings.text: We recommend drinking it 15–30 minutes before meals or when cravings strike — typically mid-morning or mid-afternoon. Avoid drinking it on an empty stomach if you have a sensitive digestive system.

settings.title: How long does it take to see results?
settings.text: Most users notice a difference within the first 2 weeks of daily use. For optimal results, we recommend a consistent 4–6 week routine. Results may vary depending on lifestyle and diet.

settings.title: How many cups can I consume in a day?
settings.text: We recommend 1 to 2 cups per day. Do not exceed 3 cups daily. More is not necessarily better — the botanicals are carefully dosed to work gently and consistently.

settings.title: ⚠️ Who should NOT consume this tea?
settings.text:
Please avoid this tea if you are:

  • Pregnant or breastfeeding — some herbs may affect hormone levels or uterine tone
  • Under 18 years old
  • Taking medication for diabetes, blood pressure, or thyroid conditions — consult your doctor first
  • Allergic to any of the listed botanicals
  • Suffering from a chronic illness — always seek medical advice before use

When in doubt, consult a healthcare professional before starting.

settings.title: What if I stop taking it will cravings come back?
settings.text: The tea supports your body in building healthier habits around food and energy. If paired with a balanced diet, most users maintain their results. That said, it is not a permanent cure — maintaining good lifestyle habits is key.

settings.title: Are there any side effects?
settings.text: The tea is made with natural, pesticide-free ingredients and is well-tolerated by most people. In rare cases, some individuals may experience mild digestive discomfort during the first few days. If symptoms persist, discontinue use and consult a doctor.
